data.body: 7-Eleven is shuttering 444 stores across North America, citing slowing sales and inflationary pressures. The retail giant targets underperforming locations as cigarette demand drops and gas-dependent foot traffic declines. The move follows a massive $52 billion takeover bid from Couche-Tard.
